---
title: Tentative Program
---

**Date**: October 13, Monday  
**Time**: from 2:15 pm to 5:45 pm  
**Location**: room HH

|Time|Event|
|---|---|
|14:15 - 14:25 | Opening and Welcome|
|14:25 - 15:15 | Keynote #1 |
|15:15 - 15:45 | Sessions #1 |
|15:45 - 16:15 | Coffee break |
|16:15 - 17:40 | Session #2 |
|17:40 - 17:45 | Closing remarks|

: {.striped .hover}
